mapper.select: SELECT AIS_NO AS aisNo, AIS_SCHDUL_NAME AS aisSchdulName, DATE_FORMAT(AIS_BEGIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS aisBeginDate, DATE_FORMAT(AIS_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS aisEndDate, AIS_TOT_DAYS AS aisTotDays FROM AI_SCHEDULE WHERE AIS_MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND AIS_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY AIS_NO DESC

SELECT P.PLC_NO AS plcNo, P.PLC_NAME AS name, P.PLC_ADDR AS address, C.CMM_CD_NAME AS type, P.PLC_THUM_IMG_URL AS image, AISP.AISP_MEMO_CONTENT AS `desc`, AISD.AISD_DAY_NO AS dayNo, AISP.AISP_VISIT_ORDR AS `order` FROM AI_SCHEDULE_DAY AISD JOIN AI_SCHEDULE_PLACE AISP ON AISD.AISD_NO = AISP.AISP_AISD_NO JOIN PLACE P ON AISP.AISP_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE C ON P.PLC_CAT_CD = C.CMM_CD WHERE AISD.AISD_AIS_NO = #{aisNo} ORDER BY AISD.AISD_DAY_NO ASC, AISP.AISP_VISIT_ORDR ASC
